Full-Stack Engineer with 6 years building React TypeScript Node.js applications. Designed and deployed Python FastAPI microservices on AWS with Docker and Kubernetes. Built PostgreSQL schemas with Redis caching layers. Implemented REST APIs and GraphQL endpoints. Established CI/CD pipelines with GitHub Actions. Practiced test-driven development agile scrum. Designed distributed systems with authentication authorization and monitoring observability. Experience with system design caching strategies and cloud infrastructure.
